extra.reason: Keyframe-aligned cuts via new mpegts.py (RAI+video-PES filter), EXTINF from PCR media time. Verified on box: segment starts with video keyframe packet (RAI+PUSI+PES 0xE0+PCR), EXTINF 2.18-2.36s media durations. Review gate PASS. Commit e225167.
Relative segment URIs in playlist; ip-addr subprocess storm eliminated. Verified on box: playlist contains bare filenames. Commit e225167.
FIFO grown to 1MB via F_SETPIPE_SZ, unbuffered reads. Deployed and verified streaming stable. Commit e225167.
/hls .ts served via twisted static.File producer (non-blocking, Range+Content-Length). Verified: HTTP 200, Accept-Ranges, correct MP2T type on box. Commit e225167.
_clean_old_segments now once per segment in _write_segment. Unit-tested (retention window), verified rotation on box. Commit e225167.

Whitelist routing implemented and verified on box: whitelisted Sky ref -> ffmpeg input http://127.0.0.1:17999/<ref>, plain ref -> 8001, hw override + normalization + caching unit-tested (67 tests green). Review gate PASS. Relay DELIVERY not verifiable off-hours (0 bytes also on direct 8001 for Sky transponder - tuner/oscam situational, not plugin logic). Commit on task/bd-094 branch.

Cache added: _channels_for(path) keyed by (path,mtime), _name_cache[ref] for lamedb lookups. Diff: cache dicts in __init__, call-site switched to _channels_for, _resolve_service_name now cached. Syntax verified.
Async ffmpeg spawn via background thread, segmenter join before cleanup, cached local_ip, directory-scan-free cleanup.
Segmenter join() added; _stop_stream now joins the segmenter thread (timeout=3s) before calling cleanup_all, closing the write/delete race.

Persistent locked log handle + 512KB rotation with .1 generation (pre-existing base, rotation check + never-raise retry path fixed); /logs reads bounded 64KB binary tail instead of readlines(). Verified by tests/test_logger.py (6 tests) + full suite 78 pass.

credentials_provider injected into StreamService (app.py + streammanager.py shim pass read_e2_credentials); platform import removed from core, grep-verified no platform import remains under core/. Covered by tests/test_stream_service.py.

FIFO opened with os.open(O_RDONLY|O_NONBLOCK); EOF-aware read loop distinguishes writer-not-yet-attached (sleep 0.1, poll stopped()) from ffmpeg-ended (exit); stop() wakes thread within ~1s via bounded select; fd closed in finally. No parked daemon threads possible. Review gate passed.
Retention raised to 2*playlist_size per RFC 8216 6.2.2; tests updated + new retention test; stale tmpfs-size comment in config.py corrected (~50-60MB per stream documented).

get_status uses len(segmenter.segments) instead of os.listdir (unused 'files' key dropped, no consumer, grep-verified); get_local_ip cached with 300s TTL in config.py, bind_ip precedence kept, 127.0.0.1 failure fallback not cached. Test added for status path.

Single-copy segment extraction via scoped memoryview in SegmentCutter._extract_segment (view released before bytearray resize, avoiding BufferError); replaces double copy (bytearray slice + bytes). Exercised by existing cutter tests, full suite 78 pass.
Won't fix per PO decision 2026-07-11: no on-box BDD/E2E suite wanted.
Won't fix per PO decision 2026-07-11: EXT-X-ENDLIST on natural end not needed for this use case (streams are reaped by inactivity timeout anyway).

ffmpeg spawn/exit callbacks marshalled onto the reactor via StreamService._marshal (reactor.callFromThread); no watcher-thread access to self.streams remains (Segmenter touches only its own state). Review gate PASS; tests for marshal + exit paths added.

Segmenter.notify_writer_exited() (threading.Event) set from _on_ffmpeg_exit; run() loop and EOF-before-data wait exit promptly instead of polling until the cleanup timer. FIFO drain semantics preserved (EOF-after-data drains fully, flush unchanged). Watchdog test added.
log_ffmpeg_exit reads bounded 8KB binary tail (read(read_bytes)) and keeps last 5 lines; safe for empty/small files and split UTF-8. Test added in test_logger.py.

All 7 dead root shims deleted (config, ffmpeg, logger, mainscreen, server, settings, streammanager) per PO decision — zero in-repo consumers, packaging is glob-based, src/plugin.py entry point kept. Dead start_ffmpeg (last consumer was the shim) also removed from ffmpeg_service. Follow-up: scp deploy cleanup bead filed.
async_start_ffmpeg takes injected logger (info/error), print() removed; StreamService passes self.logger. Unit tests added (success/failure/logger=None) with stubbed Popen. Live-verified on box.

Callbacks bind the registration's segmenter; _stream_info_for filters stale callbacks (stream_id reuse); stale spawn terminates the orphan process (monitor thread still wait()s it — no zombie). Tests for stale exit + orphan terminate. Review gate PASS.

Makefile deploy wipes BOX_PLUGIN_DIR (rm -rf && mkdir -p, guarded against empty PLUGIN_NAME) before copying — force clean install per PO directive. Executed live: box wiped, redeployed, verified via /<ref> root route, /status, /hls segment fetch.

ci.yml python-tests job added (ubuntu, py3.12, pytest — old verify job never ran Python tests since pyproject/requirements missing). 3 real-FIFO integration tests added (stop-wake, notify-wake, stream-through-FIFO), skip on Windows; verified passing under WSL Linux (94/94).
Traceback only appended when sys.exc_info()[0] is not None; 'NoneType: None' noise gone. Two tests (with/without active exception). Deployed to box.

Logger injected via set_logger(), wired in AppContext after logger creation; whitelist read-failure warning now hits plugin.log. print() kept only as documented pre-wiring fallback (unreachable in production call path) and covered by test. Review gate PASS, 95 tests green.

Per-life FIFO names via module-level itertools.count() suffix; all pipe_path consumers verified to use segmenter.pipe_path; cleanup handles old (unsuffixed) and new (suffixed) leftovers, both tested. Review gate PASS, 95 tests green.

Residue pipe file removed at stale ffmpeg exit callback via _remove_residue_pipe (None-guard, FIFO-guard, debug/warning logging); 3 tests cover residue-present, residue-absent, unlink-failure. Review gate PASS, 98 tests green.
cleanup_old_session_files now matches .m3u8.tmp (tuple endswith, py2.5+); cleanup test extended. Review gate PASS.

pyproject.toml with conservative ruff default rules (E4/E7/E9/F), Lib/Scripts excluded; ruff installed; pre-commit hook now runs ruff+pytest via python/python3 -m fallback — gate mechanical. ruff clean over 27 files. Review gate PASS.
